overall.description: Handheld footage of a person walking through a grassy field at night near an airport during a thunderstorm, with an illuminated control tower visible on the left and lightning flashing in the distant sky.

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the distant storm clouds
bright lightning strike visible behind the control tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy field toward the storm, approaching the airport control tower

entered.detail: tall industrial tower with red aviation warning lights on top
long barrier with bright white lights running parallel to the path
dark storm clouds with active lightning visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera walks through a dark grassy field at night during an active thunderstorm. An airport control tower with distinctive red warning lights stands on the left, while lightning periodically flashes in the distant storm clouds ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field moving away from airport tower

events.description: multiple lightning flashes illuminate the sky behind the receding tower
distant lightning strike visible in the storm clouds ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the field, moving past the control tower and deeper toward the storm

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, now moving past the airport control tower which recedes into the left distance. The illuminated perimeter fence parallels the path on the left while lightning continues to flash in the storm clouds ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, storm-swept field that gradually shifts from a view of a towering structure to an open perimeter path. It begins with the camera walking through tall grass at night, where an airport control tower with red warning lights looms on the left against a backdrop of lightning flashing in distant clouds. As the camera advances, the tower begins to recede into the distance, shifting the focus toward the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal an illuminated perimeter fence that parallels the path on the left, while the storm continues to illuminate the dark sky ahead.
